name: align_is_noop_for_unaligned

name: align_changes_already_aligned
reason: If aligning an already-aligned value changes it, the function incorrectly modifies valid inputs.
output_tail:
gned(a: usize, b: usize)
    |       ---------------------------------------------------------- at the end of the function body
...
496 |         align_to_usize(a, b) != a,
    |         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ failed this postcondition

name: align_exceeds_input
reason: Downward alignment must never produce a value larger than the original input.
output_tail:
gn_exceeds_input(a: usize, b: usize)
    |       ------------------------------------------------ at the end of the function body
...
495 |         align_to_usize(a, b) > a,
    |         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ failed this postcondition

error: aborting due to 1 previous error; 1 warning emitted

name: align_result_not_multiple
reason: The result of alignment to b should always be a multiple of b; violating this breaks all page-table address invariants.
output_tail:
(a: usize, b: usize)
    |       ------------------------------------------------------ at the end of the function body
...
495 |         align_to_usize(a, b) % b != 0,
    |         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ failed this postcondition

error: aborting due to 1 previous error; 1 warning emitted

name: align_not_idempotent
reason: Alignment should be idempotent; applying it twice must yield the same result as once, otherwise downstream walk computations diverge.
output_tail:
------------------- at the end of the function body
...
495 |         align_to_usize(align_to_usize(a, b), b) != align_to_usize(a, b),
    |         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ failed this postcondition

error: aborting due to 1 previous error; 1 warning emitted
